title: Suggestion for Formula Columns in the Goal Widget and Mirrored Formula Columns in the Numbers Widget
excerpt: We would like to submit a suggestion to be able to select and pull in numbers to the goal widget from a formula column. In addtion, be able to pull in mirrored formula column numbers  into the Number column. It lets you …

posts.author: GavinARivers (Gavin)
posts.cookedHtml: We would like to submit a suggestion to be able to select and pull in numbers to the goal widget from a formula column. In addtion, be able to pull in mirrored formula column numbers into the Number column. It lets you select the mirrored formula column but it doesn’t actually bring in the number.
